name: Lemons Peel & Stick Wallpaper Yellow - Opalhouse™: Cute Removable Vinyl, Repositionable, Stain-Resistant, Washable
description:
Add a little zest to your space with the Lemons Peel and Stick Wallpaper from Opalhouse™. This wallpaper has a playful pattern of lemons for a bright look that's perfect for livening up a kitchen, bathroom or a living room accent wall. The wallpaper has an adhesive back that makes it easy as can be to apply — simply cut the needed amount, peel off the backing and stick to the wall with none of the mess or fuss of traditional wallpaper. One roll provides enough for 27.5 square feet of space, and the wallpaper has a vinyl finish that's easy to keep clean.

This is your house. Where you create spaces as bold as your spirit. Collect objects as inspired as your dreams. Find pieces that remind you of every place you’ve been. Discover stories to inspire everywhere you have yet to go. This is Opalhouse.
